zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Chapman於1649年3月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特時，她的父親John Chapman36歲，母親Martha Wombrey25歲。她於1674年3月12日與John Judson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1695年7月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Chapman于1649年3月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特时，她的父亲John Chapman36岁，母亲Martha Wombrey25岁。她于1674年3月12日与John Judson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1695年7月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州利其費爾德伍德伯里享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Chapman was born on 9 March 1649, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Chapman, was 36 and her mother, Martha Wombrey, was 25. She married John Judson on 12 March 1674, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 July 1695, in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Chapman est née le 9 mars 1649, à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Chapman, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Martha Wombrey, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Judson le 12 mars 1674, à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juillet 1695, à Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Chapman am 9. März 1649 in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chapman 36 und ihre Mutter Martha Wombrey 25. Sie hat am 12. März 1674 in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America John Judson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juli 1695 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Chapman è nata il il 9 marzo 1649 nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Chapman, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Martha Wombrey, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Judson il 12 marzo 1674, nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 luglio 1695, nel Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chapmanが1649年3月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードで生まれた時，父John Chapmanは36歳，母Martha Wombreyは25歳であった。1674年3月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードでJohn Judsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1695年7月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州リトチフィールドウッドブリーで46歳で死去した。

ko.Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드
ko.Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드

ko.Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 우드버이
ko.Woodbury, Litchfield, Colony of Connecti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 우드버이
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chapman(이)가 1649년 3월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chapman(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Wombrey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1674년 3월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 John Judson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1695년 7월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 우드버이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Chapman nasceu em 9 de março de 1649, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Chapman, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Martha Wombrey, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Judson em 12 de março de 1674, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de julho de 1695, em Woodbury, Litchfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Chapman родилась 9 марта 1649 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Chapman было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Wombrey, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Judson 12 марта 1674 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 июля 1695 г. в местности вудбури, личфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Chapman nació el 9 de marzo de 1649, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Chapman, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Martha Wombrey, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Judson el 12 de marzo de 1674, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de julio de 1695, en Woodbury, Litchfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años.
